_comment: Reusable Meshy AI generation manifest for Aurora Vigil 3D actors. Driven by tools/meshy_assets.py. Pipeline per asset: text-to-3d preview -> refine (textured) -> remesh (mandatory, controls topology/polycount) -> download GLB. All content is original IP: no Superman/DC names, logos, capes, red-and-blue costumes, cities, villains, or story beats.
negative_prompt: cape, flowing cloak, red and blue costume, superman, batman, marvel, dc comics, copyrighted superhero, brand logo, text, watermark, low quality, deformed, extra limbs

assets.name: The Lumen
assets.prompt: Original near-future superhero character, full body standing T-pose, athletic adult figure in a sleek teal and matte-black armored bodysuit, glowing gold hexagonal chest emblem, swept-back gold ion mantle fins mounted on the shoulders and back, smooth helmetless head with short hair, no cape, heroic confident proportions, stylized game-ready character, clean silhouette

assets.name: Rogue Civic Drone
assets.prompt: Small non-humanoid civic security quadrotor drone, dark purple and gunmetal angular chassis, four short rotor arms with ducted fans, a single glowing teal cyclops sensor eye on the front, compact hovering sci-fi robot, no humanoid features, game-ready prop, clean design

assets.name: Null Choir Resonator
assets.prompt: A sinister alien-tech resonator device, dark obsidian crystalline structure with pulsing violet energy veins, floating geometric shards orbiting a central dark core, mounted on a heavy matte-black alloy base with warning hazard stripes, sci-fi enemy technology, ominous glowing accents, game-ready environment prop

assets.name: Shimmer Echo Cascade Emitter
assets.prompt: A radiant energy emitter device, sleek silver and white cylindrical core with concentric golden rings, soft teal and amber light pulses, floating particle rings, clean futuristic design with glass panels showing internal energy flow, solar-tech aesthetic, game-ready environment prop

assets.name: Solar Array Panel
assets.prompt: A large futuristic rooftop solar panel array, hexagonal blue photovoltaic cells with gold conductive traces, mounted on an articulated white alloy frame with hydraulic pistons, clean energy technology, slight weathering, industrial sci-fi aesthetic, game-ready environment prop

assets.name: Skyway Transit Pod
assets.prompt: A sleek futuristic autonomous transit pod for a skyway system, elongated aerodynamic capsule with panoramic tinted windows, white and teal livery with gold accent lines, magnetic levitation skids underneath, neon underglow, clean cyberpunk public transport design, game-ready vehicle prop
